title: Airtable Cost Creator
desc: Add new fixed cost records to the Operations Director Airtable base with correct linked fields and automatic payment status.

title: Cash Flow Forecast
desc: Generate a 30-day rolling cash flow forecast combining Santander and TNT Mgt Zempler accounts from live Airtable data.

title: Commercial Loan Agreement Generator
desc: Generate a commercial loan agreement PDF from variable inputs, with auto-calculated repayment schedule and first payment date.

title: Transaction Reconciler
desc: Daily reconciliation of financial transactions in the Operations Director Airtable base, matching unreconciled transactions against history and posting a summary to Slack after approval.

title: Airtable Tenancy Creator
desc: Create a new tenancy record linked to an existing tenant, with auto-calculated rent due date and inherited payment defaults.

title: Airtable Tenancy Ender
desc: End a tenancy by updating the Tenancies, Tenants, and Rental Units tables — setting end date, clearing unit, and marking the property void.

title: Contractor Job Creator
desc: Log contractor maintenance jobs to Airtable with the Maintenance Ticket ticked and notify the assigned contractor via Slack.

title: Schedule of Works
desc: Analyse a property walkthrough video to identify defects and generate an idiot-proof contractor-ready Schedule of Works in Markdown and PDF.

title: Airtable Tenant Creator
desc: Add a new tenant record to the Tenants table in the Operations Director Airtable base with correct field mappings and Active status.

title: Airtable Tenant Onboarding
desc: End-to-end three-phase workflow to create a tenant record, create the linked tenancy, and update the rental unit to Occupied.

title: Tenant Complaint Handler
desc: Handle tenant complaints end-to-end — source context from all systems, draft a firm and fair reply signed by Erica, and action post-approval.

title: Tenant Document Generator
desc: Generate an AST agreement and Proof of Residency letter from four tenant inputs, converted to PDF ready for e-signing.

title: UC47 Form Automation
desc: Complete the UC47 DWP online form for Universal Credit tenants using Airtable data, handling email verification and requiring Kevin's approval before submission.

title: Evernote PDF Processor
desc: Split multi-document PDFs from Evernote into separate files and create individual Inbound Comms task records in Airtable.

title: Gmail Respond Manager
desc: Fetch To Respond emails, draft replies using the knowledge base, batch-present for approval, create Gmail drafts, and manage label transitions.

title: Gmail to Airtable Inbound
desc: Sync emails labelled To Respond in kevin@runpreneur.org.uk to Airtable as deduplicated Inbound Comms task records.

title: Adobe Sign Field Setup
desc: Guides the full Adobe Sign e-signature workflow including recipient setup, field reassignment, and workarounds for the Chrome extension viewport conflict.

title: Airtable Task Creator
desc: Create tasks in the Operations Director Airtable base using a two-phase workflow with Slack notification to non-Kevin assignees.

title: Daily Schedule
desc: Build a practical, realistic daily schedule from a list of tasks and constraints, then add each block to Google Calendar after confirmation.

title: Meeting Manager
desc: Reschedule or create meetings in Google Calendar and notify all attendees via Slack DM or email fallback.

title: Post Manager
desc: Process scanned post PDFs — classify each document by urgency, recommend actions from the knowledge base, get approval, then send a Slack summary.

title: SimilarWeb Analytics
desc: Retrieve traffic, engagement, ranking, traffic sources, and geographic data for any domain using the SimilarWeb API.

title: Weekly Check-in Task Manager
desc: Extract action items from weekly check-in transcripts and create standardised Airtable tasks after Kevin's authorisation.

title: Video Generator
desc: Professional five-phase AI video production workflow from brief to finished clips, covering reference images, keyframes, video, and audio mixing.

title: Skill Creator
